event_claims.description: Hudson’s Bay entered into the Teachers’ Investment Agreement with Teachers’ and the Equity Provider.
event_claims.quote_text: On July 28, 2013, Hudson’s Bay entered into an equity investment agreement (the “Teachers’ Investment Agreement”) with Teachers’ and the Equity Provider

event_claims.description: Teachers’ provided a guarantee of the Equity Provider’s obligation to pay the purchase price for Hudson’s Bay shares and warrants.
event_claims.quote_text: Teachers’ is providing to Hudson’s Bay a guarantee of the Equity Provider’s obligation to pay the aggregate purchase price for the Hudson’s Bay common shares and warrants to be issued to the Equity Provider thereunder.

event_claims.description: Hudson’s Bay entered into the West Face Investment Agreement with funds advised by West Face.
event_claims.quote_text: on July 28, 2013, Hudson’s Bay also entered into an equity investment agreement (the “West Face Investment Agreement” and, together with the Teachers’ Investment Agreement, the “Equity Investment Agreements”) with funds advised by West Face

event_claims.description: Hudson’s Bay closed its underwritten prospectus offering of subscription receipts, raising gross proceeds of CDN $275.3 million.
event_claims.quote_text: on September 10, 2013, Hudson’s Bay closed its underwritten prospectus offering of 16,050,000 subscription receipts at a price of CDN $17.15 per subscription receipt raising gross proceeds of CDN $275.3 million

event_claims.description: The debt commitment letter obtained by Hudson’s Bay at execution of the merger agreement remained in effect and unmodified.
event_claims.quote_text: the debt commitment letter obtained by Hudson’s Bay at the time of execution of the merger agreement remains in effect and unmodified

event_claims.description: The Lenders agreed to provide debt financing under the debt commitment letter.
event_claims.quote_text: pursuant to which Bank of America, N.A. and Royal Bank of Canada (and, in some cases, certain of their affiliates) (collectively, the “Lenders”) have agreed to provide debt financing

event_claims.description: Amendments were made to Hudson’s Bay existing facility to provide for required amendments, making restatement to the CDN $750 million asset-based revolving facility no longer required.
event_claims.quote_text: amendments were made to Hudson’s Bay existing facility to provide for the required amendments on August 16, 2013, and therefore the restatement to the CDN $750 million asset-based revolving facility is no longer required
